tools.name: postcopilot_generate_post
tools.description: Generate a viral Threads post using a fine-tuned AI model. Provide a topic or idea and get a ready-to-post caption. Returns the generated text.

tools.name: postcopilot_download_video
tools.description: Download a video from a Threads post URL. Returns direct video download URLs (no watermark). The URL must be a Threads post containing a video (e.g. https://www.threads.com/@user/post/ABC123).

tools.name: postcopilot_export_profile
tools.description: Export up to 20 recent posts from a Threads user profile. Returns structured post data including text, likes, replies, reposts, and timestamps. Provide a profile URL like https://www.threads.com/@username.

tools.name: postcopilot_export_followers
tools.description: Export up to 60 followers from a Threads user profile. Returns usernames, display names, follower counts, and verification status. Provide a profile URL like https://www.threads.com/@username.

tools.name: postcopilot_export_following
tools.description: Export up to 60 accounts that a Threads user follows. Returns usernames, display names, follower counts, and verification status. Provide a profile URL like https://www.threads.com/@username.

tools.name: postcopilot_read_guide
tools.description: Read a PostCopilot blog post / guide about Threads. Returns the full text content. Use postcopilot://blog/catalog resource first to see available guides, or provide a topic to search.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: postcopilot_generate_post, postcopilot_read_guide · Public sink: postcopilot_generate_post, postcopilot_download_video, postcopilot_export_profile, postcopilot_read_guide.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: postcopilot_generate_post, postcopilot_read_guide · Public sink: postcopilot_generate_post, postcopilot_download_video, postcopilot_export_profile, postcopilot_read_guide

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
